name: Menu
description: A flexible menu component for navigation with support for nested items, collapsible sections, active state management, and sidebar integration.
usage_guidelines: Use for application navigation, sidebars, or hierarchical menu structures.
Compose with MenuItem and MenuGroup components for menu structure.
Use defaultActiveKeys to set initially active menu items.
Use defaultExpandedKeys for initially expanded menu groups.
Set sideCollapsed for collapsed sidebar state.
Handle onSelect to respond to menu item clicks.

defaultCollapseActiveKeys.description: Active keys when sidebar is collapsed.

menuItemHeight.description: Height of menu items in pixels.

onSelect.description: Callback fired when menu item is selected.

variant.description: Visual style variant of the menu.

styling_info.visual_description: A vertical list of menu items with hover and active states. Supports nested items with indentation. Collapsible groups show expand/collapse icons. Active items are highlighted with primary color.

Do: Use for primary navigation in applications
Provide clear, concise menu item labels
Use icons for better visual recognition
Dont: Don't nest menus too deeply (max 2-3 levels)
Don't use for form selections (use Select instead)
Don't forget to manage active state
Don't overload with too many top-level items
